aligned|far|TURN_RIGHT|regress.lesson: [aligned, far] TURN_RIGHT → regress -3059cm (bad). Turn increased distance — unusual, check heading.

aligned|far|TURN_RIGHT|neutral.lesson: [aligned, far] TURN_RIGHT → no change. Unnecessary turn — was already aligned. Move forward instead.

aligned|far|MOVE_FORWARD|neutral.lesson: [aligned, far] MOVE_FORWARD → no change. No significant progress — may need to adjust heading.

aligned|far|TURN_LEFT|neutral.lesson: [aligned, far] TURN_LEFT → no change. Unnecessary turn — was already aligned. Move forward instead.

aligned|far|MOVE_FORWARD|regress.lesson: [aligned, far] MOVE_FORWARD → regress -202cm (bad). Forward motion increased distance — possible obstacle or wrong heading.

aligned|far|stuck|failure_pattern.lesson: Stuck: forward motion blocked (obstacle or wall). Turn to find a clear path before continuing forward.

aligned|far|backtrack|failure_pattern.lesson: Wrong direction: moved forward but distance increased by 202cm. Bearing was aligned. Turn toward goal before moving forward.

aligned|far|MOVE_FORWARD|progress.lesson: [aligned, far] MOVE_FORWARD → progress +399cm (good). Moving forward when aligned is efficient.
